gold.title: Animated State Icons
gold.reason: Icons that animate between states (e.g. loading to success) — polished micro-interaction that elevates CTA and form feedback.

gold.title: Animated Weather Icons
gold.reason: Animated weather icon set — visually rich and impressive for dashboards, apps, and feature showcases.

gold.title: Interactive Animated Arrow Icon
gold.reason: Arrow icon with interactive animation — polished directional cue great for CTAs and navigation links.

silver.title: Social Icons
silver.reason: Social media icon set — essential for marketing sites, clean implementation.

silver.title: Icon Picker 3
silver.reason: Interactive icon picker — useful for CMS and admin interfaces where users select icons.

silver.title: Icons
silver.reason: Extended shadcn icon set — practical extension with additional UI icons.

bronze.title: Icons
bronze.reason: Raw shadcn icon definitions — base utility with no visual enhancement over the primitive set.
